titleStmt.title: SII 16.36: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 36. (A.R. No. 405 of 1911.) ATTIRĀLA, RAJAMPET TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up at the ruined main entrance of the Paraśurāmēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1399, Hēmalaṁbi, Śrāvaṇa ba. 8, Thursday, Gōkulāshṭami, corresponding to 1477 A.D., August 2, the week-day, however, was Saturday.

This incomplete record states that Avasaram Aṇṇamarusayyaṅgāru, having camped at Siddavaṭṭa visited Araturēvula on the day of Gōkulāshṭami, enquired into the affairs of the temples of Kshētrēśvara Paraśurāma and Bhairava and finding that worship and offerings had been stopped and the temple revenues mismanaged, granted land to the temples for offerings and worship, for the prosperity of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakavaruṣa
ṁbulu 1399 Agunē
ṭi hēmaḷaṁbi saṁ
vatsara śrāvaṇa ba 8
gu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalē
śvara mēdinīmīsaraga
ṁḍa kaṭhārisāḷuva sā
ḷuva narasiṁgayyadēva
mahārājula Avasara A
ṇṇamarusayyaṁgāru
śiddhavaṭṭānaku viccēsi pu
ṁḍḍi goṁkulāṣṭami pu
ṇyakālānanu Aratu
rēvulaku viccēsi A
raturēvula kṣētrēśva
radēvara paruśarāmē
śvaradēvara bhayirava
dēvara yī dēvaḷlaku
pūjanayivēdyālu
naḍacē pū¨rvvamariyā
da vicāriṁcci naḍu
maṁtrālanu ppaṁnu
jellevāru Anyā

yaṁcēsi dēvastānālku
cellē tāḷla yīṁdulaṁ
surasuṁkkaṁ nimityānanu
kānika kaṭṇaṁgona ni
mityaṁ divastānālu
nōgili pūjanayi
vēdyālu naḍavakuṁḍa
ṁgānu parāmarasiṁ
cci narasiṁggayyadēva
mahārājulaku Āyi
rārōgya Ayiśvaryābhivri
ddhi Avunaṭṭugānuṁnnu pu
trapautrābhivraddhi A
vunaṭṭugānunnu yiṣṭā
¨rthasiddhi Avunaṭṭugā
nunnu dēvastānālu
ku pūjanai vēdyālu
naḍacē Aṭṭugānu
Araturēla dēvastā
nālaku polaṁ je
llē varimaḍi 4 n[.] jēni
staḷānaku 32 nnu Aṁ
kkanikālvastaḷānanu 3
ku 134 nnu vubhaya
muṁnnu staśālu 2
ṁṭṭanu ku 166 guṁ Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 16.36 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
